name: get_updates
description: Poll for new messages and updates from chats. Agents can receive user messages, commands, and callback queries.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Identifier of the first update to be returned. Must be higher than previously received update_id if the last update was processed.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of updates to be retrieved. Values between 1-100 are accepted. Default is 25.

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Timeout in seconds for long polling. Allows the server to hold the connection for up to the specified number of seconds waiting for updates.

parameters.name: allowed_updates
parameters.description: List of the types of updates you want your bot to receive. Omitting this parameter results in all update types except chat_member being returned.
